name: @signet/cli
description: CLI for Signet - portable AI agent identity

scripts.build:workspace-deps: cd ../.. && bun run build:core && bun run build:connector-base && bun run build:opencode-plugin && bun run build:oh-my-pi-extension && bun run build:connector-oh-my-pi && bun run build:pi-extension && bun run build:connector-pi && bun run --filter '@signetai/connector-claude-code' --filter '@signetai/connector-codex' --filter '@signetai/connector-gemini' --filter '@signetai/connector-hermes-agent' --filter '@signetai/connector-opencode' --filter '@signetai/connector-openclaw' build
scripts.build:dashboard: cd ../dashboard && bun install && bun run build
scripts.prebuild: bun run build:workspace-deps && bun run copy:skills

author: Nicholai
